items.name_cn:
Pochette Métis #M44875# Non-inspected Version
▪️Size: 25*19*7cm▪️
Classic work—Postman bag details, timeless classic, also known as the 'entry-level postman bag'
Versatility beyond imagination, classic monogram fabric, giving an eternal vibe. From its birth to the present, from a bestseller to a classic, it has always been deeply loved. Simple and classic styling! Original factory color-changing material, plus our exclusive French original material, full steel hardware. This is a bulk production piece with ZP visual appeal.

items.name_cn:
OnTheGo Medium Series | CODE:M45321
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 34 x 26 x 13cm
The best choice for this season's new arrivals in the OnTheGo Medium Series.
The OnTheGo Medium bag features a leather shoulder strap design, making it look more premium and offering a better user experience. The classic Monogram pattern is designed for two-tone matching, allowing you to present a unique style at will. The tote's versatile carrying styles are a favorite among women, combining high aesthetics with excellent functionality!
